content.problemStatement: Write a program for the coding challenge "Bear and Big Brother". Refer to LeetCode description: https://codeforces.com/problemset/problem/791/A
content.inputFormat: Two integers a and b on the same line, representing the initial weights of Limak and Bob.
content.outputFormat: The number of years it will take for Limak to be at least as heavy as Bob.

hidden.label: tricky case / empty-like / negative if allowed

solution.approach: Iterate through the years, doubling Limak's weight each year until he is at least as heavy as Bob.

code.Python3:
a, b = map(int, input().split())
years = 0
while a < b:
    a *= 3
    b *= 2
    years += 1
print(years)
